item.dc:creator: Nnoodles

item.description: In 1969, a secretary accidentally invented the correction fluid that would save millions of students from rewriting entire papers. But Bette Nesmith Graham's journey from single mom to millionaire inventor is one of the most inspiring underdog stories in business history... Bette Nesmith Graham was a single mother working as a secretary in Dallas in the 1950s when electric typewriters made her job much harder. Unlike older typewriters, mistakes on electric models couldn't be easily erased, forcing secretaries to retype entire pages for single errors. Graham watched artists painting a bank's holiday windows and had a brilliant idea. In her kitchen, she mixed white tempera paint with a common solvent to create a correction fluid. She secretly used it at work for months, painting over her typing mistakes and letting them dry before typing the correction on top. When other secretaries noticed her error-free work, they begged for the formula. Graham began mixing batches in her kitchen blender and selling bottles from her home. She called it 'Mistake Out,' later renamed 'Liquid Paper.' Despite being fired from her secretarial job for spending too much time on her side business, she persisted. By 1968, she was producing a million bottles annually from a converted garage. In 1979, Graham sold Liquid Paper to Gillette Corporation for $47.5 million plus royalties. She used her wealth to establish foundations supporting women in business and the arts. Interestingly, her son Mike Nesmith became famous as one of The Monkees, but even he admitted his mother's invention had more lasting impact than his music career.

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: This pea, spinach and green onion risotto, with chicken is brought to you by @DocHarriers You can see other goodies in his posts and the recipe for this one is here: https://imgur.com/gallery/pea-spinach-green-onion-risotto-with-chicken-DcY6fcr
27 Man Tax: Misha Collins
“Listen to me, mister. You’re my knight in shining armor. Don’t you forget it.” - Ethel Thayer I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Seriously y'all. Coming to only comment "omg that's AI" bums me out. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server so you guys can donate memes to the museum for future CCC posts. I don't want to run out! Also, we can hang out, play some trivia, talk about movies & tv and, apparently, sleepyitis, Monty Python and the Holy Grail and RACK-oons. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Update on my shrinkingness <3
item.description: Hey everyone. I have been sharing a bit of my story on here. Basically I lost 80pounds. Had weight loss surgery. Struggled with over-corrective anorexia, Lost another 200 in 10 months. I'm here to talk so maybe someone will see this and know there are resources, and hope. The surgery has been an incredible tool. . And if anyone makes you feel like that's cheating. No....it's not. And if it was a magic bullet, which, no You still do the hard work, So what? So what if someone has to "cheat" to live. That's not wrong. It's called survival If your on a journey like mine already. RemeWe just care. We have to support those who are on a journey similar to ours. For me I struggle to get enough nutrition, some struggle with over eating. Our challenges are diffrent, and thoughNo two stories the same. Who else can really understand those hurdles And if you're wanting to begin this journey? I know that you can. I never thought I would lose weight, I had fully accepted I would stay heavy, live poorly, and die young. But here I am. So if you've written yourself off. Don't. TLDR: Hi I lost almost 300lbs! I hope to inspire others. #weightlossjourney #weight_loss #weightloss

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: I'm so done
item.description: The only responsibility I have anymore is to keep my dogs happy and healthy, so I'm choosing to be homeless, to live in my car and a couple of tents. I am going "boondocking" in remote forests, by myself. I have luxuries now that weren't available the last time I did this, namely a battery powered cooler and solar charger. I also have a couple of guns for protection, and I know how to use them. I'm completely disconnecting myself from the internet and removing GPS devices from my car. Of course, I will have a charged up phone available for emergencies, but with no internet access. I also have some money saved up for emergencies. The state of the world is too much for me to bear. My country is being ripped apart. I have everything I need to live in the woods for the foreseeable future. So off I go, with my dogs, into the wild blue yonder! #memes #socially_awesome_awkward_penguin
item.dc:creator: GloriousGirl
Icantanymore242

item.title: Vulnerable update time again!
item.description:
Time for another very vulnerable update since y'all like me sharing my journey. For the new ones, I crushed both feet, both legs, left hip, right knee, pelvis, and lower spine 4 years ago then was bed-bound for 2.5 years and gained a lot of weight. 5 months ago I started a journey to lose enough to get spine surgery. Through diet, exercise, water aerobics, giving up soda, and wegovy I've lost 46lbs ( 20.8kg or 3.2 stone) since then. I find that my balance is better since starting yoga, as is my endurance and core strength.
Side profile now... I'm finally starting to see the weight loss. These pants didn't fit a month ago.
I've also improved my portion sizes. Now I eat healthy, a lot of whole foods, and use the palm of my hand to measure some things as well as measuring out exact potions. No more than a cup at a time.
Overall I feel very blessed t be able to Start this journey. Even on days like today where my legs hurt incredibly badly. I'm going to keep sharing my journey and keep losing. I plan to take back my body.

item.title: Zodiacs as Gods - Makeup - MCroft07
item.description:
Aries
Sagittarius
Taurus
Virgo
Capricorn
Leo
Gemini
Cancer
Aquarius
Pisces
Libra
Scorpio I designed all of these based on reading about zodiacs (I know nothing) and talking to people about what they feel like represents them the most who do like looking at their star signs. They're original designs and I built the headpieces too. Sharing since most of you guys didn't know that I also do a lot of these and asked me to share more, I don't just do character paints, those are just the Saturday paints that I do. However, I also paint Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday with other designs that are based on my face and chest :) These are actually old now, I did them in 2021, but a lot of people still like them :) I'm a Capricorn (December 31)
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: A Warhero
item.description: Fp edit: when I made this video I had pulled up the camera right after I read the article headline. Shortly after posting this if I had a bit of a breakdown and ended up having a set of seizures. Life has not been good since he came into power. Everything that I had hoped for now is impossible. For instance getting any service dog, living somewhere relatively decent, having a chance to go back to school, all this stuff out the window. I'm so depressed, and distressed from everything going on that the only thing keeping me going is making a stupid little videos. I don't even get to do photography of squirrels and critters like I was because of the construction here has run them all off. Circling back, I just want to thank you all for commenting and being around all these years. Excuse me while I have an anxiety attack https://www.newsweek.com/donald-trump-suggests-hes-war-hero-mark-levin-2116010
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: Toxic "friends"
item.description: So I've been talking to this guy for a long time. He is anti Trans. Pro trump. Anti gay pride. Insists on two genders only. He got upset with me the other day and cut contact. I thought I'd be very lonely without at least someone to talk to. But I've been suppressing parts of myself all this time talking with him. I feel bad but I hope he doesn't try to talk to me again. I'm tired of not being myself. I should have cut contact myself a long time ago honestly. I know this won't get far, I'm just used to talking to someone so I'm talking here. Edit: Update: He is not coming back, we have ended the friendship. Edit 2: Woah! I went to sleep and boom! Thank you everyone for all the support and words of encouragement! You guys rock!
item.dc:creator: SparklyAntelope

OldGrudges

item.title: The practice of hiring Nepalese Sherpas to build mountain pathways in Norway began around 2000, initiated by Geirr Vetti of Stibyggjaren after recognizing their Himalayan expertise in stone construction. Initially focused on erosion control and safety
item.description: The practice of hiring Nepalese Sherpas to build mountain pathways in Norway began around 2000, initiated by Geirr Vetti of Stibyggjaren after recognizing their Himalayan expertise in stone construction. Initially focused on erosion control and safer trails amid rising tourism, early projects restored historic routes like Keiserstien in Bodø. Over two decades, Sherpas have completed over 300 staircases and paths across Norway, enhancing accessibility in fjords and peaks while protecting landscapes. Paid generously, their seasonal earnings—often $200–$300 daily—equate to over 10 years’ wages in Nepal, enabling community support back home.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Fuck cancer
item.description: Got diagnosed around 2 weeks ago. Got a colostomy and a catheter. Havent even gotten to my first treatment yet, and I already hate this. Am terrified for my future. Never really made anything of my life, but this is not how i would like to leave it. Don't know the stage yet, but given a ct apparently showed an enlarged lymph node, and i had symptoms, its probably 2+. Mostly screaming into the void, because i dont know what else to do.

item.title: More memes
item.dc:creator: MyharothS

item.title: My Work In "Twisted Metal"
item.description:
For those of you who have played the "Twisted Metal" games, the live action is pretty fun. I run a blacksmith/specialty shop and sometimes I get to put things in the movies. This is Sweet Tooth threatening Anthony Mackie. I got to make that sword!
Here's the blade before "age and dirt" treatment. Made of 7075 T6 aluminum and pecan wood handle. Not exactly high end knife making but how fun!
This little hatchet is one of mine too. I never get told exactly how they are used so its cool to see them pop up as Im watching the show.
They needed "little axes" with "junk" on them. I get to do some pretty awesome stuff. I was recently nominated (in proxy at least) for the Prop Master's Guild "McGuffin Award". I love these fun diversions from real work.
item.dc:creator: TrentonTye
